description: Agent discovers code duplication that should be refactored

context.discovery: Found three separate functions (export_orders_to_csv, export_invoices_to_csv, export_products_to_csv) that duplicate 90% of the CSV generation logic. Each function has its own CSV header building, row formatting, and file writing code. This makes bugs like the recent encoding issue appear in multiple places.
context.impact: Maintenance burden and risk of inconsistent behavior across export functions.
